name: com.apple.tvremote
title: TV Remote
description: The payload that configures the Apple TV remote.

payloadkeys.content: The array of valid devices that Apple TV can connect to.

subkeys.content: The array of valid devices that Apple TV can connect to.
The MAC address of a permitted iOS device that can control this Apple TV. Use the format `xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx`, which isn't case-sensitive.

payloadkeys.content: The array of valid Apple TV identifiers that the remote can connect to.

subkeys.content: The array of valid Apple TV identifiers that the remote can connect to.
The MAC address of an Apple TV device that the system permits this iOS device to control. Use the format `xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx`, which isn't case-sensitive.
The name of an Apple TV device that the system permits this iOS device to control.
